TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Htuw beh kawas 1924 byacing 2 ryax 2, wan mhoqin sa kawas 2007 byacing 3 ryax 24 83 kawas ryax'nqyanux. hiya' ga smimun hayyo na p'ega ruw miru sa pinqzyuwan na zyuwaw ruw sinmung pgiki'. aring beh 5 kawas niya lga musa tmwang kya Alpaniya' qutux ngasai nha la. ktan nha' beh ana ega' inu' kryax hiya', ruw geki'ing na kokka' na Alpaniya. ryax niya pgeki' ga beh kawas 1945 ruw pucing beh kawas 1994. wan nha' syun beh pyang hopa' balay lalu na (People's Artist beh Alpaniya') lalu' niya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ńßtuw ő≤eńß kawas~…ē **** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax *, wan mńßoqin s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax ** ** kawas~…ē rjax Ēnqjanux. ńßija Ē …£a s~…ēmimun ńßajjo na p Ēe…£a ruw miru s~…ēa pinqzjuwan na zjuwaw ruw s~…ēinmuŇč p…£iki Ē. ariŇč ő≤eńß * kawas~…ē nija l…£a mus~…ēa tmwaŇč kja alpanija Ē qutux Ňčas~…ēai nńßa la. ktan nńßa Ē ő≤eńß ana e…£a Ē inu Ē krjax ńßija Ē, ruw …£eki ĒiŇč na kokka Ē na alpanija. rjax nija p…£eki Ē …£a ő≤eńß kawas~…ē **** ruw pu ¶~ ®iŇč ő≤eńß kawas~…ē ****. wan nńßa Ē s~…ējun ő≤eńß pjaŇč ńßopa Ē ő≤alaj lalu na (people Ēs~…ē artis~…ēt ő≤eńß alpanija Ē) lalu Ē nija. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: Htuw beh kawas 1924 byacing 2 ryax 2, wan mhoqin sa kawas 2007 byacing 3 ryax 24 83 kawas ryax'nqyanux. hiya' ga smimun hayyo na p'ega ruw miru sa pinqzyuwan na zyuwaw ruw sinmung pgiki'. aring beh 5 kawas niya lga musa tmwang kya Alpaniya' qutux ngasai nha la. ktan nha' beh ana ega' inu' kryax hiya', ruw geki'ing na kokka' na Alpaniya. ryax niya pgeki' ga beh kawas 1945 ruw pucing beh kawas 1994. wan nha' syun beh pyang hopa' balay lalu na (People's Artist beh Alpaniya') lalu' niya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ńßtuw ő≤eńß kawas~…ē **** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax *, wan mńßoqin s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax ** ** kawas~…ē rjax Ēnqjanux. ńßija Ē …£a s~…ēmimun ńßajjo na p Ēe…£a ruw miru s~…ēa pinqzjuwan na zjuwaw ruw s~…ēinmuŇč p…£iki Ē. ariŇč ő≤eńß * kawas~…ē nija l…£a mus~…ēa tmwaŇč kja alpanija Ē qutux Ňčas~…ēai nńßa la. ktan nńßa Ē ő≤eńß ana e…£a Ē inu Ē krjax ńßija Ē, ruw …£eki ĒiŇč na kokka Ē na alpanija. rjax nija p…£eki Ē …£a ő≤eńß kawas~…ē **** ruw pu ¶~ ®iŇč ő≤eńß kawas~…ē ****. wan nńßa Ē s~…ējun ő≤eńß pjaŇč ńßopa Ē ő≤alaj lalu na (people Ēs~…ē artis~…ēt ő≤eńß alpanija Ē) lalu Ē nija. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
